title: 2025/10/23 - JU [Part 1]
displayTitle: 2025-10-22 - Justice Committee - Summary Offences (Demonstrations Near Residential Premises) Amendment Bill [Part 1]
topic: Summary Offences (Demonstrations Near Residential Premises) Amendment Bill
description: Thursday 23 October 2025 | Justice Committee Summary Offences (Demonstrations Near Residential Premises) Amendment Bill Submitters Peace Action Wellington - Valerie Morse, Member, Peace Action Wellington E tu - Karena Brown, Lead Strategic Researcher Anne Hare Max Marshall Jen Olsen
descriptionSummary: Summary Offences (Demonstrations Near Residential Premises) Amendment Bill. Peace Action Wellington. Valerie Morse, Member, Peace Action Wellington
